name: Banana Nut Pancakes
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the rice flour, baking powder, salt, and xanthan gum in a medium bowl.
2. Stir in water, vegetable oil, honey, egg yolks, mashed bananas, and chopped nuts until well mixed.
3. In another medium bowl, beat the egg whites until stiff peaks form.
4. Gently fold the beaten egg whites into the batter.
5. Heat a hot griddle or skillet with vegetable oil.
6. Pour the batter onto the heated surface, cooking each side until golden brown.
Each serving (2 pancakes) provides:
283 calories
6 g. protein
12 g. fat
40 g. carbohydrate
2 g. dietary fiber
55 mg. cholesterol
399 mg. sodium
Source: Basic Rice Recipes for those with allergies
